operational_scenes.scene_title: Explanation of Soft Stop (E Stop) Functionality
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Clarify the behavior and limitations of the soft stop (E stop) feature
operational_intents: Explain difference between soft stop and actual emergency stop
Describe AGV behavior when soft stop is pressed during movement
Explain how to restart AGV after soft stop
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract detailed operational behavior of soft stop
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Soft stop behavior critical for safe AGV operation

operational_scenes.scene_title: Overview of Additional Map Icons and Their Functions
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Introduce and explain additional icons for AGV path visualization and station IDs
operational_intents: Describe 'view all ATV paths' icon and its map visualization
Explain station IDs and their significance
Differentiate between stations and cells on the map
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract icon functions and map visualization details
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Understanding icons aids in AGV path monitoring

operational_scenes.scene_title: Explanation of Charger IDs and Map Interaction
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe charger IDs and how to interact with map objects
operational_intents: Explain charger IDs and their uniqueness
Describe clickable map objects and selection process
Detail icon selection for inspecting different object types
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract map interaction and object identification details
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Map interaction essential for system monitoring and debugging
